name: SanDisk Corporation
description: SanDisk Corporation was a prominent American technology company that specialized in the design, development, and manufacturing of flash memory storage solutions. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in Milpitas, California, the company became a global leader in providing memory cards, USB flash drives, and solid-state drives (SSDs) for both consumer and enterprise markets. SanDisk was acquired by Western Digital in 2016, and today it continues to operate as a well-recognized brand under the Western Digital umbrella, maintaining its reputation for high-performance, reliable digital storage products used in photography, computing, and mobile devices worldwide.
